subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the signs of God! Among the wondrous tokens and marvelous mysteries of the Lord in every age and dispensation are secrets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله از غرائب آثار و عجائب اسرار پروردگار در هر کور و دوری سر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
